title: Hide Item IDs on Client-Facing Quotes

posts.author: ashtondavanzo (ashton@adrenalinattractions.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Item IDs currently appear next to item names on quotes with no option to hide them. This is confusing for clients and makes quotes look cluttered and unprofessional. Please add a setting to hide item IDs on client-facing quotes.

What are you trying to achieve

Present clean, professional client-facing quotes without internal system IDs that confuse clients or detract from the document’s appearance.
